Introduction
    A paint-ball team accidentally finds in a national park the consumed corpse of a woman, soon identified from dental records as the wife of protestant minister Joseph Serrano. She was declared missing six months ago, then returned ...

Filming locations: 20th Century Fox Studios - 10201 Pico Blvd., Century City, Los Angeles, California, USA
